# Site Acceptance Testing Checklist: What Project Managers Must Verify Before Signing Off on Biosafety Equipment

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
项目现场验收是项目经理最关键的签字节点，验收不充分可能导致后续运维问题。本角度提供系统化的现场验收检查清单，帮助项目经理"不背锅"。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
A comprehensive site acceptance test (SAT) checklist is the project manager's primary risk mitigation tool—missing a critical check today becomes a compliance audit finding tomorrow.

## 参考素材
- Mechanical installation verification: mounting alignment, door swing clearance, seal compression gap measurements
- Electrical verification: voltage confirmation (220V/380V), grounding continuity, emergency stop function test
- Control system testing: PLC communication, HMI interface operation, door interlock sequence
- Pressure decay test procedure: test pressure (-500Pa), duration (20 minutes), acceptance criteria (≤250Pa loss)
- Visual inspection criteria: weld quality, surface finish, hardware tightness
- Documentation handover: as-built drawings, operation manuals, maintenance schedules

## 关键词
Site Acceptance Test, SAT Checklist, Installation Verification, Pressure Test, Compliance Sign-Off, Risk Mitigation
